chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD R.A No.71 of 2004 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on CMA-1410/2017 2. For orders on CMA-1411/2017 09.10.2017 Mr. Willayat Ali Magsi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Behzad Ali Umrani, Advocate for respondents. = 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, the parties in the present proceedings are seeking disposal of this civil revision by way of compromise and in support of this application the applicant as well as the respondents have sworn their respective affidavits which are already on record. I have gone through the application as well as affidavits sworn by the parties. It appears that the parties have patched up their dispute by way of compromise, therefore, in the interest of justice the compromise arrived at between the parties is allowed. Accordingly, this civil revision application is disposed of in terms of the compromise. JUDGE Shahid
